summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PREDA landing page - both backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly with minor overlay issues on some buttons

ui_bugs.issue: Button clicks intercepted by overlay elements (hero-glow div)
ui_bugs.workaround: Force clicks work, but normal clicks are blocked by overlay

ui_bugs.issue: FAQ content not properly accessible after clicking trigger
ui_bugs.details: FAQ opens but content selector needs adjustment

passed_tests: Backend stats endpoint returns numeric feedback_count and waitlist_count
Backend feedback submission with valid data returns 200 + persisted record
Backend feedback submission with empty data returns 400
Backend feedback submission with partial data returns 200
Backend waitlist signup with valid email returns 200 + persisted record
Backend waitlist duplicate email returns existing record (idempotent)
Frontend hero section loads with correct headline
Frontend navbar waitlist button scrolls to waitlist section
Frontend interactive preview tabs work (Overview, Events, Players)
Frontend agents section shows all 6 agent cards
Frontend FAQ accordion opens items when clicked
Frontend feedback survey navigation (Next, Back, Skip) works
Frontend feedback survey submission with filled answers works
Frontend feedback survey empty submission correctly rejected
Frontend waitlist form submission works and shows success state
All required sections exist with correct data-testids
No runtime errors or uncaught exceptions found
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix overlay issues preventing normal button clicks in hero section. The hero-glow div is intercepting pointer events. Consider adding pointer-events: none to overlay elements or adjusting z-index layering.
